content.full_text:
State of California
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. BOX 807 · SACRAMENTO, 95804 · · · 1100 K STREET BUILDING, SACRAMENTO, 95814

June 24, 1976

James M. Edmunds, Judge
South Bay Municipal Court
430 Davidson Street
Chula Vista, CA 92010

Dear Judge Edmunds:

This letter is in response to your inquiry of
June 15, 1976.

You are required to file a Statement of Economic
Interests, Form 721, pursuant to Government Code Section 87203, within 30 days after your anniversary date
of assuming office. Since you were elected to a new
term of office on June 8, 1976, and will assume office
on January 3, 1977, your statement will be due no later
than February 2, 1977.

If you have any further questions, please contact
this office.

Sincerely,

Dawn Wiser
Conflict of Interest Division

TECHNICAL ASSISTANCE/ADMINISTRATION (916) 322-5660 · EXECUTIVE/LEGAL 322-5901 · ENFORCEMENT/CONFLICT OF INTEREST 322-6441

The image appears to be almost entirely blank or washed out, with only very faint marks visible at the top that are too unclear to transcribe accurately. The rest of the page shows no legible text content.

JAMES M. EDMUNDS
JUDGE

The Municipal Court
SOUTH BAY JUDICIAL DISTRICT
COUNTY OF SAN DIEGO, STATE OF CALIFORNIA
430 DIVISION STREET
CHULA VISTA, CALIFORNIA
TELEPHONE (714) 420-4925

June 15, 1976


State of California
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA. 95804

RE: South Bay Judicial District
San Diego County, California

Gentlemen:

I was appointed Judge of the Municipal Court for the
above district on August 19, 1975. The statutory authori-
zation for this appointment is contained in Government Code
74741 which became operative on July 1, 1975.

It should also be noted that at the June 8th primary,
I was elected to a new term of office which will commence
on January 3, 1977.

QUESTION

Pursuant to the terms of Government Code Section 87203
(and any other applicable sections), am I required to file
a financial disclosure statement by July 30, 1976, or any
other date prior to February 3, 1977?

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Very truly yours,

JAMES M. EDMUNDS, Judge
South Bay Municipal Court

CC: Hon. Thos. J. Gligorea,
JME:bcr Presiding Judge

[The image appears to be a very faded or low-contrast document with text that is largely illegible. While there appear to be multiple paragraphs and sections of text throughout the page, the content is too faint to read with confidence. The document seems to contain several blocks of text with varying paragraph breaks, but the specific words and content cannot be reliably transcribed due to the poor visibility of the text against the light background.]
